calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John DiAna appeared by zoom for executor.

Mr. DiAna stated that there is not much money in the estate, that the estate is insolvent because money is owed to the personal representative and that he thinks the estate should be closed. The Frist and Final Report of Administration, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to acknowledge the account and report, and grant the remaining relief as prayed.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-11-2024 Continued To Aug-27-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-15-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-06-2024 Continued To May-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Deborah Taylor, Esq., for John Quiroga, Executor.

At the court's query, counsel reports that her client has been ill which has caused the delay in closing the Estate and requests a continuance of sixty (60) to ninety (90) days accordingly. Counsel confirms that the estate's real property has been sold.

The matter is continued to May-15-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file a petition by May-01-2024.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-10-2024 Continued To Mar-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Nov-28-2002 is admitted to probate. John A. Quiroga is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-10-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-08-2022 Continued To Dec-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
